untranslatable_reason: Signal requires cointegration-based spread analysis between two currency pairs (CAD.USD vs AUD.USD). No allowed indicators support multi-pair spread computation, z-score normalization, or cointegration coefficients. The 20-day mean/std dev of a synthetic spread cannot be expressed using only single-pair price indicators. Critical parameters (threshold, half_life) marked AUTHOR_SILENT are undefined.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy using price_pos_20 (position within 20-day range) and bb_pct_b (normalized to mean) to approximate mean reversion, but this does not capture the core pair-trading logic. Original signal is fundamentally untranslatable without multi-pair spread indicators.
